hero.title: Plans for Every Need
hero.description: Whether you're an individual patient or a large hospital network, we have a plan that fits. Start free, upgrade when you're ready.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.description: All plans include core features. Upgrade anytime.

faq.question: Can I use NeronaHealth for free?
faq.answer: Yes! Our free plan includes AI symptom check (5 per month), hospital search, basic appointment booking, and digital health records. Upgrade anytime for more features.

faq.question: How does the AI symptom check work?
faq.answer: You describe your symptoms in natural language, and our AI analyzes urgency, identifies potential conditions, and recommends the appropriate care pathway—all in seconds.

faq.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Cancel anytime from your account settings. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.

faq.question: Is my health data secure?
faq.answer: Yes. We use bank-grade encryption, are HIPAA compliant, and never sell your data. You control who sees your information and for how long.

faq.question: How do I add family members to my plan?
faq.answer: Once you subscribe to the Family plan, you can invite family members from your dashboard. They'll receive an email to create their linked account.

faq.question: What hospitals are in your network?
faq.answer: We partner with 500+ verified hospitals across all 36 states in Nigeria. Use our hospital search to find facilities near you.
